scripts.build: npm run typecheck && rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && esbuild src/main.ts --bundle --format=esm --target=es2020 --outfile=dist/main.js && cp index.html dist/index.html && cp src/styles.css dist/styles.css && cp src/maplibre.css dist/maplibre.css && cp src/athan.css dist/athan.css
scripts.test: rm -rf dist-test && tsc -p tsconfig.json --outDir dist-test && node --test dist-test/planner.test.js
scripts.android:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync android
